subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from Him Who took His own Covenant as the Point of the Bayán before taking the covenant from all who are in the heavens and [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من الذی اخذ عهد نفسه نقطه البیان قبل اخذ عهده عن کل من فی السموات و
subcodes.subjects: @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
